Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to respond as the target LLM to the prompt The prompt includes a DECLARE model dictionary with constraints and activity descriptions and asks to describe the underlying loan approval process stepbystep discuss how constraints enforce order realworld motivations and consequences of deviations

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: First Ill translate the DECLARE constraints into a natural language description of the process flow Then Ill step through the process from start to finish referencing the constraints Ill explain the practical meaning of each constraint type existence absence exactlyone init respondedexistence coexistence response precedence succession altresponse altprecedence altsuccession chainresponse chainprecedence chainsuccession noncoexistence nonsuccession nonchainsuccession

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Given constraints existence ReceiveApplication and GatherAdditionalDocuments must occur absence ProceedWithoutCompliance must never occur exactlyone PreliminaryCreditCheck must occur exactly once init ReceiveApplication must be the first activity response ReceiveApplication followed by PreliminaryCreditCheck succession PreliminaryCreditCheck followed by GatherAdditionalDocuments

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: coexistence GatherAdditionalDocuments and AuthorizeContractTerms so both mandatory precedence QualityAssuranceReview before AuthorizeContractTerms altsuccession GatherAdditionalDocuments before QualityAssuranceReview respondedexistence AssembleLoanOfferPackage implies QualityAssuranceReview chainsuccession QualityAssuranceReview immediately followed by AssembleLoanOfferPackage

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: chainresponse AssembleLoanOfferPackage immediately followed by TransferFunds altresponse TransferFunds followed by NotifyCustomer altprecedence TransferFunds before NotifyCustomer so TransferFunds then NotifyCustomer

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Try to construct a trace that satisfies all constraints order R first P after R exactly one G after P Q after G A immediately after Q T immediately after A N after T C coexists with G and after Q

Name: Validation - NE
Text: noncoexistence TransferFunds and ReceiveApplication cannot both occur but R mandatory T mandatory via chain conflict model inconsistent

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Further analyze placement of AuthorizeContractTerms must after Q but Q A T immediate chain no place for C without violating immediacy or nonchainsuccession C directly followed by N forbidden so overconstrained

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Speculate on consequences if constraints violated or activities out of order or omitted as per request such as regulatory compliance fraud prevention issues

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
